identity.name: Volt
identity.core_concept: Precision mobility in the dark city. High contrast, safety-first, electric aesthetic.

layout_strategy.mobile_drawer: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-background border-t border-border rounded-t-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-6 rounded-full font-medium border border-white/5

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm

inputs.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 h-12 rounded-lg text-lg px-4

maps.container: relative w-full h-full overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/5 shadow-inner bg-zinc-900

visual_enhancers.textures: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50
visual_enhancers.map_style: Dark Mode Map (Mapbox Dark or Google Maps Night Mode)

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure yellow text is only on dark backgrounds. Use black text on yellow buttons.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44px height for all mobile interactive elements

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, use deep solid colors with noise texture.
Maps should be the primary interface for logged-in users.
Use 'Sheet' or 'Drawer' components for mobile interactions instead of Modals.
Input fields should be large (h-12 or h-14) for easy tapping.
Status colors: Green (Available/Arrived), Yellow (Waiting), Blue (En Route).
Always use a 'back' button on sub-pages.
Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs.
